title: The Right Click Harvest
description: Breaking crops, picking up items, and replanting them
body:
# The Right Click Harvest ### Simple Crop Harvesting & Replanting [![Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/the-right-click-harvest?style=for-the-badge&color=00AF5C&label=Downloads)](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-right-click-harvest) [![Version](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/v/the-right-click-harvest?style=for-the-badge&color=orange&label=Latest%20Ver)](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-right-click-harvest/versions) *** ## What is this? **The Right Click Harvest** does exactly what it says: it lets you right-click fully grown crops to harvest and replant them instantly. It saves you from the hassle of breaking crops and manually replanting seeds every time. ![In Game Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/41977ca1a601d48cdb1bebd58a1db327a4215fbd.png) *** ## Features | Feature | Description | | :--- | :--- | | **Simple Harvest** | Right-click any grown crop to harvest it. | | **Auto-Replant** | Automatically replants the seed from your inventory or the crop drops. | | **Manual Mode** | Hold **Shift** (Crouch) while right-clicking to harvest *without* replanting. | *** ## Installation
How to Install (Click to Expand) 1. Download the **The Right Click Harvest** `.jar` file for your version. 2. Make sure you have **Fabric API** installed. 3. Place the file into your `.minecraft/mods` folder. 4. Launch the game and start farming!
***
